antipattern.description: Running MMR on a factoid single-answer query.
antipattern.reason: Diversity penalty hides the single best chunk. Detector: query_type=factoid AND mmr enabled. Fix: skip MMR per decision tree.

antipattern.description: Pool size N == K; MMR collapses to identity.
antipattern.reason: No selection benefit, only cost. Detector: pool_n == top_k. Fix: r3-candidate-pool-2k.

antipattern.description: Implementation re-embeds candidates inside the MMR loop.
antipattern.reason: Latency spike 10-100x. Detector: per-query embedding call count > 1. Fix: r2-need-candidate-embeddings.
